arguments.argument: if newSprite=0 draw_sprite_ext(sprite_index,image_index,x,y,image_xscale,image_yscale,image_angle,image_blend,image_alpha) else if newSprite=1 //Gate 2 - 1 draw_background_part(tileZelda2,32,32,16,16,x,y) else if newSprite=2 //Gate 2 - 2 draw_background_part(tileZelda2,128,176,16,16,x,y) else if newSprite=3 //Magical Quest - Cloud draw_background_part(tileMagicalQuestA,0,128,48,16,x-8,y) else if newSprite=4 //Gate 2 - 2 draw_background_part(tileZelda2,128,192,16,16,x,y)
